tests.expr: r = solve_constraints(3, [('lt', 0, 1), ('lt', 1, 2)]); assert len(r)==3 and len(set(r))==3 and all(1<=v<=3 for v in r) and r[0]<r[1]<r[2]; print(True)
r = solve_constraints(4, [('diff', 0, 1)]); assert len(r)==4 and len(set(r))==4 and all(1<=v<=4 for v in r) and abs(r[0]-r[1])>=2; print(True)
r = solve_constraints(4, [('adj', 0, 1)]); assert len(r)==4 and len(set(r))==4 and all(1<=v<=4 for v in r) and abs(r[0]-r[1])==1; print(True)
r = solve_constraints(4, [('lt', 0, 1), ('diff', 0, 1)]); assert len(r)==4 and len(set(r))==4 and all(1<=v<=4 for v in r) and r[0]<r[1] and abs(r[0]-r[1])>=2; print(True)

r = solve_constraints(5, [('lt', 0, 1), ('adj', 0, 1), ('lt', 2, 3), ('adj', 2, 3)]); assert len(r)==5 and len(set(r))==5 and all(1<=v<=5 for v in r) and r[0]<r[1] and abs(r[0]-r[1])==1 and r[2]<r[3] and abs(r[2]-r[3])==1; print(True)
r = solve_constraints(6, [('lt', i, i+1) for i in range(5)]); assert len(r)==6 and len(set(r))==6 and all(1<=v<=6 for v in r) and all(r[i]<r[i+1] for i in range(5)); print(True)
r = solve_constraints(4, [('adj', 0, 1), ('adj', 1, 2), ('adj', 2, 3)]); assert len(r)==4 and len(set(r))==4 and all(1<=v<=4 for v in r) and all(abs(r[i]-r[i+1])==1 for i in range(3)); print(True)
